name: longrein-extension
description: Optional local agent extensions maintained by Longrein.

interface.shortDescription: Search prior coding-agent sessions with the local cass CLI.
interface.longDescription: Longrein Extension provides the agent-facing cass workflow while FastCtx, CodeGraph and cass remain official upstream tools installed by the Longrein CLI.
defaultPrompt: Search my previous coding-agent sessions for relevant context.
